news.t: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq

overview.description: The VictoryShares Short-Term Bond ETF (USTB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed bond fund that invests primarily in US issues with a dollar-weighted average maturity of three years or less. USTB was launched on Oct 24, 2017 and is issued by VictoryShares.

data.title: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Victory Portfolios II today announced plans to transfer the listing of six ETFs from NYSE to Nasdaq on or around November 1, 2022.
